title: Amazon tops cloud expectations on strong AI demand
description: Amazon.com last night reported cloud sales growth above Wall Street expectations, driven by strong enterprise spending as companies continue to devote tremendous resources to their artificial intelligence efforts.

title: Meta falls on concerns over AI spending, legal scrutiny
description: Meta Platforms has raised its annual capital spending forecast, signalling plans to pour billions more into artificial intelligence infrastructure even as it confronts potential losses from a global youth backlash against social media.

title: 'AI Like Bhasmasur': Rajnath Singh's Take On Dilemma Of Artificial Intelligence In Defence
description: Rajnath Singh highlighted the dual-use challenges posed by Artificial Intelligence during the ANI National Security Summit 2.0. , India News, Times Now
content: Talking about the dual-use dilemma of Artificial Intelligence (AI), Rajnath Singh on Thursday said that deep fakes, cyber warfare, and autonomous weapon systems have posed new challenges in the defence sector. Comparing AI's use case to the mythologi... [2387 chars]

title: Learning in the age of AI: how Scholé is rethinking workplace education
description: As artificial intelligence rapidly reshapes the global economy, the traditional corporate training model is facing a quiet crisis of relevance. In a world where knowledge is generated instantly by autonomous systems, Scholé AI is rethinking the very nature of adult education.
content: What if the primary challenge facing modern companies isn’t a lack of training, but the way we learn? For decades, corporate education has relied on a "one-size-fits-all" architecture: standardized modules, passive video content, and compliance-drive... [4395 chars]

title: ‘They said AI saved me’: How South Korea is checking on its older adults
description: An artificial intelligence-powered call service​ adopted by cities and counties across South Korea check​s on thousands of older adults living alone in isolation or poverty.

title: 20,000 jobs for freshers: AI may be changing workplace, but Infosys is still hiring big
description: Infosys CEO Salil Parekh says the company will not cut jobs as AI reshapes the IT sector, instead focusing on hiring and reskilling. With plans to onboard 20,000 graduates, Infosys is betting that artificial intelligence will expand opportunities rather than reduce demand for talent in the long run.
content: At a time when much of the global tech industry is trimming headcount in response to automation, Infosys is taking a different path. Rather than cutting jobs, the company is doubling down on hiring and reskilling, signalling confidence in how artific... [2646 chars]

title: SRM University Launches AI-Integrated M.Sc. Economics and Psychology Programmes
description: SRM University-AP, Amaravati, has introduced M.Sc. Economics and Psychology programmes incorporating Artificial Intelligence. The courses focus on interdisciplinary learning, hands-on training, and AI integration, preparing students to tackle real-world challenges. Scholarships up to 100% are available, ensuring access for high-achievers.
content: SRM University-AP, Amaravati, has announced the launch of cutting-edge M.Sc. programmes in Economics and Psychology, each meticulously crafted for the era of Artificial Intelligence (AI). These advanced courses aim to redefine postgraduate education ... [895 chars]

title: Integrated M.Sc. Economics and M.Sc. Psychology Programmes
description: Amaravati (Andhra Pradesh) [India], April 30: The Easwari School of Liberal Arts (ESLA) at SRM University-AP, Amaravati, has launched its M.Sc. Economics and M.Sc. Psychology programmes, both rebuilt for the age of Artificial Intelligence (AI). Designed for a technology-driven world, these postgraduate programmes equip students with advanced analytical, research, and applied skills through a strong emphasis on interdisciplinary learning, hands-on training, and AI integration. Scholarships and fee concessions of up to 100% are available for eligible candidates, ensuring accessibility for high-achieving students.
